title: Burden of Proof for Lack of Due Care
text: The party claiming that a person did not exercise a requisite degree of care has the burden of proof on that issue.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences
structure.article_title: Burden of Proof on Specific Issues

notes: Allocates the burden of proof to the party asserting lack of the requisite degree of care.
